# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.011 — Prorating Fees

If the board prescribes the term of a general distinguishing number, license, or license plate under this chapter for a period other than one year, the board shall prorate the applicable annual fee required under this chapter as necessary to reflect the term of the number, license, or license plate.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290 (H.B.2017), Sec. 26, eff. September 1, 2011.*
